name: 7-up Refrigerator Dough
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine 2 cups of flour, yeast, sugar and salt; mix well.
2. In a saucepan (or microwave), heat 7-up, water, and butter until warm (120-130°F); butter need not melt. Add to flour mixture.
3. Add egg and yolks. Blend at low speed until moistened.
4. Beat for 3 minutes at medium speed. Gradually stir in enough remaining flour to make a soft dough.
5. Knead on a floured surface until smooth and elastic, 3-5 minutes.
6. Place the dough in a greased bowl, turning to grease the top. Cover with plastic wrap and foil.
7. Refrigerate for 4-24 hours. While chilling, punch down several times.
8. Remove desired amount of dough; refrigerate remaining dough until needed.
9. Shape into any of the four following coffecake recipes that will be posted under this subject.
